defaultReply: I can help with projects, skills, education, research, goals, and contact details. Try asking: What is your ESP32 project?

entries.answer: Hello, I am Montassar's portfolio assistant. Ask me about projects, skills, experience, or contact details.
Montassar Nawara is an AI Systems Engineering profile focused on edge AI, distributed backend systems, and real-time intelligent applications.

The Smart Platform for Verbal Aggression Detection uses audio DSP and machine learning for real-time aggression detection, optimized for embedded constraints. Repo: https://github.com/Montassarnawara/Smart-Platform-for-Verbal-Aggression-Detection
Research work: AI-Based Energy and Water Optimization for Sustainable Agriculture. Repo: https://github.com/Montassarnawara/AI_Based_Energy_Water_Optimization
Backend experience includes building high-performance Go REST APIs with Hazelcast, secure middleware, and Docker-based deployment workflows.
Core areas: Edge AI (ESP32, DSP, ML), distributed backend (Go, Hazelcast, REST APIs), and intelligent agents/LLM workflows.
Montassar is open to internships in AI Engineering, Embedded AI, and Distributed Backend Systems.
